message:
test(plugins): add comprehensive unit tests for plugins package (ntm-3dx8)

Add 20 unit tests covering both CommandPlugin and AgentPlugin:

CommandPlugin tests:
- LoadCommandPlugins: non-existent dir, empty dir, executable detection
- LoadCommandPlugins: ignores non-executables and directories
- LoadCommandPlugins: parses header comments for metadata
- parseScriptHeader: various comment formats and edge cases
- Execute: args and environment variable passing

AgentPlugin tests:
- LoadAgentPlugins: non-existent dir, empty dir, valid TOML parsing
- LoadAgentPlugins: filename fallback for name, skips invalid TOML
- LoadAgentPlugins: validates name regex, skips missing command
- pluginNameRegex: comprehensive valid/invalid pattern testing

All tests run in parallel with proper isolation using t.TempDir().

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
